commit.message:
Fix new_affordances: use stable identity (action+field) instead of label

Text affordances append "(current: ...)" to the label after being set,
causing the label-based diff to falsely report them as new. Now uses
action + field as the stable identity key for set_field affordances.

commit.message:
Add fork hotkey (F) and `overcode fork` CLI command (#347)

Fork creates a child agent with the source's full conversation context
using `claude --resume <id> --fork-session`. Inherits directory,
permissions, agent persona, CLI flags, and standing instructions.

TUI: F to fork focused agent, time context moved to Ctrl+T.
CLI: `overcode fork <source> [-n name] [-p prompt]`

commit.message:
Replace Tailwind JS play CDN with proper CSS stylesheet

The cdn.tailwindcss.com play CDN is JavaScript-based and fails on
mobile browsers (content blockers, JS execution issues), causing
pages to render as completely unstyled HTML with giant SVGs.

Switched all 7 pages to the pre-built Tailwind v2.2.19 CSS file
served as a regular stylesheet from jsDelivr. Also added inline
width/height attributes to SVGs on the offering page as a safety net.

- Muestra 'Verificando...' mientras se obtiene el token al abrir el panel
- Solo reactivarNotificaciones (acción manual) borra y fuerza renovación

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Major upgrade: Memory, Task Queue, ReAct, Heartbeat, Inter-Agent Chat

5 OpenClaw-inspired improvements:

1. AGENT MEMORY — Persistent markdown memory per agent. After each task,
   Claude extracts learnings and saves them. Memory is injected into
   future tasks so agents get smarter over time. Auto-compacts at 10KB.

2. TASK QUEUE — Per-agent serial queue (OpenClaw Lane Queue pattern).
   When a task finishes, the next 'todo' task auto-runs. Priority
   ordering (critical > high > medium > low). No more manual "Run" clicks.

3. ReAct LOOP — Multi-step reasoning (Reason → Act → Observe → Repeat).
   Agents can do up to 3 reasoning steps per task. Can consult other
   agents mid-task via [CONSULT:agent_id] syntax.

4. HEARTBEAT — Scheduled proactive tasks:
   - Auto-standup every 8 hours
   - Queue monitor every 60 seconds (finds idle agents with pending tasks)
   - Memory compaction every 24 hours

5. INTER-AGENT CHAT — Agents can ask each other questions mid-task.
   Consultations appear in team chat. Memory from consulted agent is
   included for context-aware responses.

New API endpoints:
- GET /api/agents/:id/memory — Read agent memory
- DELETE /api/agents/:id/memory — Clear agent memory
- POST /api/agents/:fromId/consult/:toId — Inter-agent consultation
- GET /api/heartbeat — Heartbeat job status + queue status

commit.message:
Fix run-test.sh: prepend /flows/ to relative flow paths

When FLOW_FILE has no directory (e.g., "android-login.yaml"), dirname
returns "." and scp copies the entire container root filesystem. Fix by
prepending /flows/ (the compose mount point) for relative paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix mycamgirl.net data fetching — retry logic, cutoff detection, null handling

Historical fetch (/api/data-fetch/historical):
- Add retry logic (2 retries with backoff) for failed API page fetches
- Fix cutoff detection: only stop when ALL activities on a page are before
  30-day cutoff, not just the first one (activities aren't always sorted)
- Skip activities with null/zero seconds (they create 0-duration intervals)
- Skip offline entries from stream_segments (only track actual streams)
- Increase page cap from 30 to 50 for better coverage
- Use .maybeSingle() instead of .single() to avoid errors on missing rows
- Track consecutive failures and stop after 3 in a row
- Mark failed jobs with completed_at timestamp
- Return activity count in response for debugging

Cron scraper (/api/cron/scrape-cam-data):
- Fetch second-to-last page too when last page has <50 items
- Filter for valid durations (skip null seconds)
- Determine live status from most recent ONLINE activity (not any activity)
- Filter today's activities by overlap with today (not just end time)
- Skip offline entries from stream_segments
- Increase live detection window from 20 to 25 minutes
- Use .maybeSingle() for upsert checks

Cam accounts tab:
- Add "Re-fetch 30 days" button per cam account for manual retry

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use numeric height on ResponsiveContainer to prevent 0px chart render (closes #3)

ResponsiveContainer height="100%" resolves to 0 in React 19 concurrent mode
before ResizeObserver fires. Replaced with height={240} so Recharts always
has a valid height on the first render. Added explanatory comment.

- [Changelog](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-go/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)

- dependency-name: go.opentelemetry.io/otel/exporters/otlp/otlptrace/otlptracehttp
  dependency-version: 1.42.0
  dependency-type: direct:production
  update-type: version-update:semver-minor
...

Signed-off-by: dependabot[bot] <support@github.com>

- Bump docker/setup-buildx-action v3 → v4 (PR #495)
- Bump docker/metadata-action v5 → v6 (PR #496)
- Bump docker/build-push-action v6 → v7 (PR #497)
- Bump docker/login-action v3 → v4 (PR #498)
- Add dependabot groups so future bumps arrive as one PR per ecosystem

The Go otel tracehttp bump (PR #501) is included as a separate cherry-pick commit.

fix: document Zustand selector rule to prevent infinite render loop (closes #6)

Inline object selectors (s) => ({ a, b }) return a new ref every render,
causing useSyncExternalStore to loop. Added a top-of-file comment enforcing
the one-call-per-value pattern already used in AgentStepper and CopilotChat.

feat: structured JSON roadmap — visual task cards, no more text dump

localStorage key changed to 'oporuta_roadmap_v2' (old plans auto-cleared).

- Output is strict JSON: diagnostico, consejo, tareas[], semana[]

- Task cards color-coded by tier with icons (Zap/Target/Flame)
- Collapsible weekly planner as 7-column grid
- Progress bar on objectives section

- Streaming shows raw JSON being generated (monospace)

feat(dashboard): Issue #3 — Dashboard Lite (shopping-only interface)

Add docs/dashboard-lite.html — a self-contained React SPA that exposes
only the Shopping List, intended as a shared household interface for
Victoria (and Ahmed) without VERA's full intelligence layer.

Features (identical to main dashboard shopping tab):
- Store sub-tabs with pending item count badges
- Toggle items done/undone (optimistic update + revert on error)
- Add Item modal with store selector and keyboard shortcuts
- Settings modal (⚙) for first-time URL + token setup
- Refresh button (↺) for manual reload
- Error banner with dismiss + toast notifications
- Full mobile responsive layout

Architecture:
- ~580 lines vs 3,300+ in index.html
- Shares vera_url / vera_token localStorage keys — users already
  connected on main dashboard need no re-entry on same origin
- No backend changes — uses existing shopping / shopping_toggle /
  shopping_add Web App actions
- ShoppingTab, AddItemModal, SettingsModal copied verbatim from
  index.html so behaviour is pixel-identical

GitHub Pages URL: /dashboard-lite.html (same domain as index.html)

Closes #3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Tasks 104-107: LVFR AEMT Phase 1 — Calendar, Scheduling, Pharm, Dashboard

Task 104: Course Calendar + Content Tracking
- GET/PATCH /api/lvfr-aemt/calendar — list days with status, mark complete
- GET/PATCH /api/lvfr-aemt/chapters — chapter progress tracking
- /lvfr-aemt/calendar page with week grouping, pace indicator, day expansion

Task 105: Instructor Scheduling & Coverage Grid
- lib/shift-calculator.ts — 48/96 rotation, weekly patterns, availability generation
- GET/PUT/POST /api/lvfr-aemt/scheduling — full grid, assignments, shift calculation
- /lvfr-aemt/scheduling page with interactive coverage grid, gap reporting

Task 106: Pharmacology Checkpoint Cards
- lib/pharm-scoring.ts — fuzzy matching scoring with word overlap (70% threshold)
- GET /api/lvfr-aemt/medications — list all 8 medications
- GET/POST /api/lvfr-aemt/pharm/checkpoints — history + submit/score checkpoints
- /lvfr-aemt/pharm page with 3-level difficulty, card-by-card flow, results

Task 107: LVFR Dashboard + Navigation + Roles
- canAccessLVFR(), canEditLVFR(), isLVFRStudent() permission helpers
- /lvfr-aemt page — dashboard with student/instructor/observer views
- /lvfr-aemt/layout.tsx — route guard + ConsentGate for agency roles
- GET /api/lvfr-aemt/dashboard — aggregated program data
- GET /api/cron/lvfr-weekly-report — weekly email to agency observers
- Added agency_observer/agency_liaison to role preview selector
- LVFR quick links in dashboard widget system
- LVFR breadcrumb labels
- Updated vercel.json with weekly report cron

and bounces also emit mini-shockwaves, connecting fireworks, supernovas,
and meteor showers to the cascade system for spectacular chain reactions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: detect stale skills by content diff, not just directory presence

Skills were considered synced if the directory name existed in the version
home, even if the file contents were outdated. Now mirrors the same
content-comparison logic already used for memory files.

Adds skillDirsMatch() helper that recursively compares all files between
~/.agents/skills/<name>/ and the version home. A skill is only marked
synced if every file matches exactly.

commit.message:
fix: auto-collapse timers in ref (survive effect re-runs) + amber status badge

Auto-collapse bug: effect cleanup was cancelling timers on every re-render
(watch() causes constant re-renders). Fix: store timers in a ref, only
cancel when section goes back to incomplete, cleanup only on unmount.

Status badge: amber warning style when section is disabled (waiting
period), subtle gray when enabled (countdown info).

COMPLIANCE (Phase 4):

REENTRY (Phase 5):

ANALYTICS (Phase 6):
